overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a dark fantasy RPG showing a white-haired character walking through a stormy forest at night. The character traverses rocky terrain, crosses a wooden footbridge over a ravine, and continues along a dirt path past a wooden hut.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky forest trail along ravine edge

events.description: approaching wooden footbridge spanning the ravine

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along a narrow dirt path beside a rocky ravine, approaching a wooden bridge

entered.detail: steep moss-covered cliff face dropping into the dark ravine
massive gray boulder beside the trail with patches of snow
narrow winding dirt path with patches of grass and snow
weathered wooden bridge with railings spanning the ravine

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow rocky trail beside a dark ravine, approaching a wooden footbridge. Large boulders and steep cliff faces line the left side of the path in the dim, stormy forest light.

events.description: stepping onto wooden footbridge, surface changes from dirt to planks
pausing at bridge midpoint to look over railing into the ravine below

agents.ego_description: crossing the wooden bridge and pausing to look over the edge into the darkness below

entered.detail: rough-hewn wooden railing along the left side of the bridge
rough-hewn wooden railing along the right side of the bridge
tall stone tower visible through the distant trees in the storm

segments.scene_description: The character crosses a weathered wooden footbridge spanning a deep ravine, pausing midway to look over the railing. A distant stone tower is visible through the trees while storm clouds darken the sky.

events.description: stepping off wooden bridge back onto dirt forest path
passing wooden hut with warm campfire light glowing from within

agents.ego_description: walking along winding dirt path past a rustic wooden hut with light glowing inside

entered.detail: winding dirt path continuing through the forest
small rustic wooden hut with sloped roof and weathered walls
low crumbling stone wall running alongside the path
warm orange light glowing from the hut window

segments.scene_description: Leaving the bridge behind, the character follows a winding dirt path through the forest, passing a rustic wooden hut with warm light glowing from within. A low stone wall runs along the left side of the trail as the storm continues.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a stormy forest that transitions from a rugged cliffside trail to a sheltered woodland path. It begins with the character navigating a narrow rocky trail beside a dark ravine, flanked by steep cliff faces and large boulders under a dim, oppressive sky. As the path leads forward, the camera follows the character across a weathered wooden footbridge spanning the deep ravine, pausing briefly to reveal a distant stone tower through the trees. The scene then shifts as the character leaves the bridge behind to follow a winding dirt path, passing a low stone wall that guides the way. Finally, the journey continues through the forest until the camera reaches a rustic wooden hut with a warm light glowing from within against the backdrop of the ongoing storm.
